settings.title: How To Use
settings.body: Apply 2–3 pumps to clean skin, morning and evening. Massage in circular motions until absorbed. Use on arms, chest, thighs and tums.

settings.title: Shipping & Delivery
settings.body: Free priority worldwide shipping. Most orders arrive in 5–7 business days. Track from your account at any time.

settings.subtitle: Plumps, tightens, firms and hydrates skin
settings.perfect_for: Perfect for arms, chest, thighs and tums. Suitable for full body use.

settings.title: 100% Natural
settings.body: Nourish using pure & natural ingredients only.

settings.title: Climate+
settings.body: Every purchase contributes to our tree planting efforts.

settings.author: Vivian A.
settings.body: I'm 78 and love my facial complexion. It is so smooth and supple. My skin easily absorbs the nourishing oils. I love this product. It's truly magical!

settings.author: Deborah M.
settings.body: I'm 72. I've been using the Maison shower oil and the body oil consistently for a month now. I absolutely love it. I see a huge difference in such a short time.

settings.author: Christina A.
settings.body: Skin is so smooth and hydrated. Love it!

settings.author: Janet T.
settings.body: Both my husband and I are using this oil and absolutely love the smell and results.
